tod_afternoon_milestone.detail: tod_afternoon_edge_v1 conflict has persisted 6 consecutive runs (first conflict to cross this threshold). LLM +5pts vs feedback -8pts = -3pts noise in 20% cohort. Auto-disable recommendation now formally triggered.

proposed_fix.effect: Disables LLM +5pts boost. Feedback -8pts continues for all afternoon trades. Net: 20% cohort goes from -3pts to 0pts (cleaner signal), 80% cohort unchanged at -8pts feedback.
proposed_fix.blocked_reason: CONFLICT — requires human confirmation to disable a deployed rule

tod_afternoon_milestone.recommendation: HUMAN: Set tod_afternoon_edge_v1 gate_percentage=0 in graduated_rules.json
